chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S- 682 of 2021 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 3. For hearing of main case 03.05.2023 Mr. Javed Haleem, advocate for respondent -------------------- Counsel for the petitioner is called absent. Counsel for the respondent has informed the Court that Execution No.12 of 2021 in respect of the subject property has been granted and the respondent has been handed over possession of the subject tenement by the Bailiff and as such this petition has become infructuous. He has produced certified copy of the order passed in Execution No.12 of 2021 along with copy of Bailiff report for handing over of possession, which are taken on record. In view of the above, this petition has become infructuous and same is accordingly dismissed along pending applications. J U D G E
